---
id: event-types-list
title: "List event types"
description: "Retrieves all active event types registered for a given application. Each event type is uniquely identified by its service, resource type, and verb."
sidebar_label: "List event types"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/hook-0-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List event types"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/event_types/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves all active event types registered for a given application. Each event type is uniquely identified by its service, resource type, and verb.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"query","name":"application_id","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"style":"form"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"event_type_name":{"type":"string"},"resource_type_name":{"type":"string"},"service_name":{"type":"string"},"verb_name":{"type":"string"}},"required":["event_type_name","resource_type_name","service_name","verb_name"],"title":"EventType"}}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad Request"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"},"409":{"description":"Conflict"},"500":{"description":"Internal Server Error"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
